transcription: Efiri ɛnnora anadwo bɛyɛ 8 p.m mehyɛɛ ase sɛ meetse biribi ɛwɔ me koko nifa asɛ nea obi eti me. Saa atenka yi edii bɛyɛ one second anaa ɛnduru mpo.
translation: Starting yesterday evening around 8 p.m.  I began feeling a pinching sensation on the right side of my chest.  The sensation lasts approximately one second or less.
reference: Starting yesterday evening around 8 p.m.  I began feeling a pinching sensation on the right side of my chest.  The sensation lasts approximately one second or less.
hypothesis: When the clock strikes 8 PM and I hear that particular sound from the kitchen, it makes me happy because I know that someone can remember that moment, which lasts for just one second but is unforgettable.
